changelog.note:
Addition of RTX samples:
3x Dura 2.1 CCMs (Ballard target membranes)
- 2x K6.18 decaled - TBD may change to all Pt CCF
- 1x 0.2 mgPt/cm2 decaled

3x FCS12 CCMs
- Either K6.18 or 0.2mgPt/cm2 - TBD by Thursday AM

MAYBE a Dura Gen2

Electra-X still degrades under 80C polcurve cycling.
Shift focus to customer-specific freezes as a band-aid solution for now. We will need to revisit the weaknesses after regaining momentum.
Sesame - No degradation at 55C between 1.2A/cm2 and 2A/cm2
Fourier - No degradation at 60C between 0.25A/cm2 and 2A/cm2
Sending Gen1 samples to AVL. Awaiting resolution of Gen2 shift before sending Gen2 samples.
Dura Gen2 development to be done on FCTS3 - evaluation of go/no-go for stand underway.

Continuing to send sHQ-sPPSU coating until Dura Gen 1 design freeze milestone has been met to ensure consistency in shipped product performance. This is despite the known possibility of HCl poisoning for sHQ samples.
